'''favate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babily|babily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babily|babily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| favate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:favate|favate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:favatesher|favatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favatesherĂ«m|favatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:favatero|favatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:favateshĂ«|favateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favateshĂ«m|favateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifavatero|gokifavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifavateshĂ«|gokifavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavateshĂ«m|gokifavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofavankerom|gofavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofavankeshĂ«|gofavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavankeshĂ«m|gofavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofavankeya|gofavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:favaterom|favaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favatemu|favatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:favateya|favateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifavaterom|gokifavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavatemu|gokifavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifavateya|gokifavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:favavate|favavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:favavatesher|favavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favavatesherĂ«m|favavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:favavatero|favavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:favavateshĂ«|favavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favavateshĂ«m|favavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifavavatero|gokifavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifavavateshĂ«|gokifavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavavateshĂ«m|gokifavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofavavankerom|gofavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofavavankeshĂ«|gofavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavavankeshĂ«m|gofavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofavavankeya|gofavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:favavaterom|favavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favavatemu|favavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:favavateya|favavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifavavaterom|gokifavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavavatemu|gokifavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifavavateya|gokifavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠte|fĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠtesher|fĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠtero|fĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠtero|gokifĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠterom|fĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠtemu|fĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠteya|fĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠterom|gokifĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠvĂŠteya|gokifĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafvafte|fafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafvaftesher|fafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafvaftesherĂ«m|fafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafvaftero|fafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafvafteshĂ«|fafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafvafteshĂ«m|fafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafvaftero|gokifafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafvafteshĂ«|gokifafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafvafteshĂ«m|gokifafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafvafnkerom|gofafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafvafnkeshĂ«|gofafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafvafnkeshĂ«m|gofafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafvafnkeya|gofafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafvafterom|fafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafvaftemu|fafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafvafteya|fafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafvafterom|gokifafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafvaftemu|gokifafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafvafteya|gokifafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
